If the Sun up in the sky should look blood-red, it would ere
long destroy the king. The same effect would follow, if the Sun
be reddened hy a dry duststorm. If the Sun's colour be dark,
variegated, blue or soiled (rough), many people would he killed.
The same disaster would overtake the country, if birds and beasts
should howl dreadfully at sunrise and sunset.

ance, colour and features will confer all good things on the people
of the world.
